seoTitle: Loongana vs Lorinna — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Loongana and Lorinna. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Loongana and Lorinna.
heading: Loongana vs Lorinna — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Loongana, Tasmania and Lorinna, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lorinna has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Loongana (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Loongana or Lorinna safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Loongana has a flood risk score of 60/100, while Lorinna scores 47/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Loongana scores 41/100 for bushfire risk. Lorinna scores 28/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Loongana or Lorinna?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lorinna has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
